seoTitle: Bodalla vs Bodangora — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Bodalla and Bodangora. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Bodalla and Bodangora.
heading: Bodalla vs Bodangora — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Bodalla, New South Wales and Bodangora, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Bodangora has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Bodalla (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Bodalla or Bodangora safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Bodalla has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Bodangora scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Bodalla scores 56/100 for bushfire risk. Bodangora scores 43/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Bodalla or Bodangora?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Bodangora has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
